questions.question: Describe the key differences between 'confidentiality', 'integrity', and 'availability' in the context of data security. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain each concept and provide a relevant example

questions.question: A company has a data breach where an unauthorized person accesses an employee's personal email account. What are the primary data security measures that the company should implement to prevent similar incidents in the future? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a detailed explanation of the measures, including technical and non-technical controls

questions.question: An organization is required to comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA). How can the organization ensure that it is adhering to both regulations? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the key differences between the two regulations and provide examples of how the organization can comply with both
